TEXT HEADING AND COUNTRY INFO LACK STRONG VISUAL EMPHASIS
CONTACT CTA AND QR CODE ARE TOO SMALL RELATIVE TO CANVAS

requiredCorrections.note: Add relevant industry-related imagery or visual elements to enhance attention and commercial appeal.
Make the job title and location stand out more prominently for immediate clarity.
Adjust spacing to better utilize empty areas, especially above the interview dates section.
Enlarge contact phone, email, and QR code for better visibility and CTA prominence.

defects: The advertisement uses a plain background with no imagery to enhance visual appeal or context about the job or location, which reduces attention-stopping power.
The text layout is dense but well structured; however, some sections could benefit from more visual separation to improve scan-ability.
Interview dates are presented in small, separate boxes that do not attract enough attention compared to other textual elements.
The QR code is integrated in the bottom bar but appears slightly small, potentially diminishing ease of use on mobile screens.

requiredCorrections.note: Add relevant and professional imagery or background to improve attention and appeal while maintaining clarity.
Increase spacing between interview date boxes and use a more prominent style to make them stand out.
Increase size and prominence of QR code for better usability and verification emphasis.
